rules.name: Duplicate mesh geometry should be reviewed
rules.message: Multiple meshes share the same topology, bounds, and geometry attributes.
rules.why: Accidental mesh copies increase scene weight, rigging cost, and export size. Reporting geometry-identical meshes helps consolidate redundant shapes while allowing intentional instance groups.

rules.name: Duplicate geometry scan budget exceeded for large scenes
rules.message: Scene exceeds duplicate-scan geometry budget; duplicate detection may be truncated.
rules.why: Large scenes can contain hundreds of shapes. Capping duplicate geometry scans keeps validation responsive while still reporting duplicates inside the scanned subset.
